releases.description:
## 1.0.0 (2026-03-14)

### :sparkles: New Features

* Import gitlab activities into current daily note ([bda33fd](https://github.com/anindyaspaul/obsidian-gitlab-activities-importer/commit/bda33fdedb92ac046836737f9f8ea14ccd4ecab2))

### :bug: Bug Fixes

* Change extension ID and increment version to 1.0.1 ([713c504](https://github.com/anindyaspaul/obsidian-gitlab-activities-importer/commit/713c50474db13de4821c298f5e6f76019fe7f611))
* Fix npm lint errors ([0614918](https://github.com/anindyaspaul/obsidian-gitlab-activities-importer/commit/0614918ae355f99d69f96620bf27cd4f0351873c))
* Fix release assets ([2a2bbf3](https://github.com/anindyaspaul/obsidian-gitlab-activities-importer/commit/2a2bbf3a9579f08ba01811e9b7c0ea18115e6c4a))

* Fix release job ([4817a51](https://github.com/anindyaspaul/obsidian-gitlab-activities-importer/commit/4817a51eea313cee441be2753081b9c0a2260904))

### :wrench: Miscellaneous Chores

* Add semantic release configuration ([765a3b0](https://github.com/anindyaspaul/obsidian-gitlab-activities-importer/commit/765a3b033235548351e2d3d30b59c6243898df9a))
